title: Model Formulation, Identifiability, and Validation · Worked Case: Nondimensionalization
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving energy demand and storage. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math adv nondimensionalization increment in a reproducible model rigor computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Derive nondimensionalization in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Formulate identifiability in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
